title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Committed and pushed session inbox wrapper slice as 3f07f59 feat: add session inbox wrapper. The slice adds meeting_ingest.session_inbox.process_session_inbox, the session-inbox CLI command, resume-safe existing handoff scanning, non-failing stale_handoff reporting, privacy-gate enforcement before scanner/extractor use, tests, and contract/workflow/skill/AGENTS docs. Verification before commit: uv run pytest => 129 passed; py_compile passed; git diff --check passed. Pushed main to origin/main.
next_actions: Next slice: expose the pending session handoff planner through status or doctor so stale/pending handoffs are visible outside session-inbox, or begin host-specific extractor adapter design for Codex/Claude/Supa/T3 if a callable sub-agent surface is available.
continuation_hint: Next: Next slice: expose the pending session handoff planner through status or doctor so stale/pending handoffs are visible outside session-inbox, or begin host-specific extractor adapter design for Codex/Claude/Supa/T3 if a callable sub-agent surface is available.
